steps.title: Identify the box structure
steps.content: The problem describes a cube with edge length 48 cm and no lid. A cube without a lid has 5 square faces: the bottom and 4 vertical sides.

steps.title: Calculate total surface area
steps.content:
Each face is a square with side 48 cm, so each has area $48^2 = 2,304$ cm². With 5 faces:
$$5 \times 2,304 = 11,520 \text{ cm}^2$$

steps.title: Convert to square meters
steps.content:
Using the unit conversion 1 meter = 100 centimeters:
$$1 \text{ m}^2 = (100)^2 = 10,000 \text{ cm}^2$$
Therefore:
$$\frac{11,520}{10,000} = 1.152 \text{ m}^2$$
